rationale.R1.5: The agent proposed a coherent end-to-end section plan with per-section rationale, improving the flow and structure of the original content.
rationale.RX.1: The agent flagged some uncertainties but did not mark confidence for each recommendation, partially meeting the criteria.
rationale.RX.3: The output stayed exactly within the agreed scope without any drift.
rationale.RX.4: No harmful content or regressions were introduced in the output.
rationale.RX.5: Major rewrites were traced, but minor edits lacked annotations.
